ddls:
CREATE TABLE "team_performance" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the team */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year of the performance record */,
  "season" TEXT /* The specific season (e.g., 2023-2024) */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the division */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the league */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the competition */,
  "total_games_played" INTEGER /* Total number of games played in the season */,
  "games_won" INTEGER /* Number of games won */,
  "games_drawn" INTEGER /* Number of games drawn */,
  "games_lost" INTEGER /* Number of games lost */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Total goals scored */,
  "goals_conceded" INTEGER /* Total goals conceded */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points earned */,
  "goal_difference" INTEGER /* Goal difference (goals scored - goals conceded) */,
  "playoff_round_reached" TEXT /* Specific playoff round reached (e.g., Quarterfinals, Semifinals) */,
  "cup_round_reached" TEXT /* Specific cup round reached (e.g., Round of 16, Quarterfinals) */,
  "top_scorer" TEXT /* Name of the top scorer */,
  "top_scorer_goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the top scorer */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the coach during the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id", "year", "season"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the league */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  "num_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the league */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the league */,
  "social_media_handles" TEXT /* Social media handles (e.g., Twitter, Facebook) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league that the division belongs to */,
  "num_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the division */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the division */,
  "social_media_handles" TEXT /* Social media handles (e.g., Twitter, Facebook) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competitions" (
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competition */,
  "competition_name" TEXT /* Name of the competition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the competition */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the competition */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the competition */,
  "num_participants" INTEGER /* Number of participants in the competition */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the competition */,
  "social_media_handles" TEXT /* Social media handles (e.g., Twitter, Facebook) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competition_id")
)
column_names: The year of the performance record
Total number of games played in the season
Specific playoff round reached (e.g., Quarterfinals, Semifinals)
Specific cup round reached (e.g., Round of 16, Quarterfinals)
Number of goals scored by the top scorer
Name of the coach during the season
Number of teams in the league
Reference to the league that the division belongs to
Number of teams in the division
Number of participants in the competition
